entity.summary: Sui decentralized exchange and DeFi trading suite providing spot automated-market-maker swaps, concentrated and conventional liquidity, cross-protocol routing, limit-order integration, strategy vaults, and leveraged perpetual markets.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Kriya as a Sui DeFi protocol with native AMM swaps, limit orders, vaults, and leveraged perpetuals. The dedicated Kriya Swap documentation describes active spot trading through in-house CLMM and AMM liquidity, a cross-protocol router, and DeepBook integration. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Kriya protocol overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Kriya as a Sui protocol offering native AMM swaps, limit orders, strategy vaults, leveraged perpetuals, and developer interfaces.

evidence.title: Kriya Swap
evidence.notes: First-party product documentation describes current spot trading through Kriya's CLMM and AMM liquidity, cross-protocol routing, DeepBook integration, pricing curves, and a live application link.
